item.title: ICE begins to purchase warehouses, but some owners are backing out of deals
item.description: Immigrations and Customs Enforcement is encountering some pushback as it undertakes a $45 billion expansion of detention centers

item.title: Utah’s Supreme Court rejects appeal to overturn congressional map with Democratic-leaning district
item.description: Utah’s Supreme Court has rejected an appeal by Republican lawmakers and left in place a congressional map that gives Democrats a high chance of pickin...

item.title: Winning numbers drawn in Friday’s Mega Millions
item.description: The winning numbers in Friday evening’s drawing of the "Mega Millions" game were: 15-40-48-58-63, Mega Ball: 2, Megaplier:

item.title: US military strikes another alleged drug boat in eastern Pacific, killing 3
item.description: The U.S. military says it has carried out another deadly strike on a vessel accused of trafficking drugs in the eastern Pacific Ocean

item.title: Murky outlook for businesses after tariff ruling prompts countermoves by Trump
item.description: Businesses face a new wave of uncertainty after the Supreme Court struck down tariffs imposed by President Donald Trump under an emergency powers law ...
